A warm, layered mid‑century inspired home with an earthy palette anchored in emerald greens, reclaimed walnut, brass accents and tactile woven surfaces. The overall direction is calm and artistic — think botanical spa meets curated gallery: lush plants, handcrafted textures, and intentional pops of warm terracotta and ochre.
